errors.error: The Alias should be between 4 and 20 characters in length.
The first character of the Alias may not be a space.
The last character of the Alias may not be a space.
The Alias should contain at least 2 capital letters.
The Alias should contain at least one space.
The Alias should contain no numeric characters.
This Alias is already in use. Please enter a different one.
Please enter a valid code.
Please enter a positive amount in the format 99999999.99
Please enter a positive amount in the format 9999.99
AE Amount must be greater than 0.00
CAPS ID number has to be 6 digits in length
Unable to select a coded party as judgement debtor.
AE number already exists.
A live AE already exists between these two parties
Invalid CAPS check digit.
The AE Number entered does not match any recognised pattern.
Please enter a valid AE Type.
Fee entered is not the standard issue fee for an AE application.
Event disallowed - Employer Address details are incomplete.
Date of Issue should be before 30-SEP-1998.
Event not allowed for this AE application type.
Event only allowed for AE application type Maintenance Arrears.
Event only allowed for AE application type Priority Maintenance.
Maintain fees only available for new AE records.
PER Report cannot be run as no PER records exist for this AE.
No valid Substituted Service address - clear event and add address.
A notice of this type has already been issued - check issue stage.
You can only mark the most recent order event record in error.
The court referred to in AE Number is not in service
AE Number has to be minimum of 8 characters in length.
Last four characters of AE number must be numeric.
Amount of Outstanding AE must be greater than 0.01.
Previous hearing does not exist.
Cannot enter event, an AE hearing does not exist.
There is a previous event awaiting service.
Service Address can only be updated once per day.
Pay to Date amount cannot exceed the combined total of Amount of AE and Fee
The instalment cannot be greater than the Judgment total.
Must be in the format 99999999.99
Must be in the format 999999999.99
Must be in the format 99999.99
Must be in the range 0.01 to 99999999.99
Must be in the range 0.00 to 99999999.99
Must be in the range 0.01 to 999999999.99
Must be in the range 0.01 to 99999.99
Must be in the range 0.00 to 99999.99
Must be in the range 0.01 to 999999.99
Must be in the range 0.00 to 999999.99
Must be in the range 0.01 to 9999999.99
Must be in the range -9999999.99 to 99999999.99
Value must be between 0.01 and 5000.00
Audit is not available for MAGS ORDER Cases.
A court must be retrieved the name can be changed.
A case must be retrieved before a Duplicate Notice can be created.
Duplicate Notice not available for MAGS ORDER Cases.
An AE number must be retrieved before AE Events screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before AE Fees and Refunds screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before AE events screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before AE screen can be called.
A CO record must be retrieved before AUDIT screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before AUDIT screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before BAR screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before CASES screen can be called.
A Home Warrant must be retrieved before CASES screen can be called.
A CO record must be retrieved before CONSOLIDATED ORDERS screen can be called.
A CO record must first be selected before DIVIDENDS screen can be called.
An enforcement number of type CO must be retrieved before the DIVIDENDS screen can be called.
A CO record must be retrieved before DETERMINATION OF MEANS screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before EVENTS screen can be called.
A Home Warrant must be retrieved before EVENTS screen can be called.
A non MAGS ORDER case must be retrieved before EVENTS screen can be called.
A CO record must be retrieved before HEARINGS screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before HEARINGS screen can be called.
A case must first be selected before HRA Details screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before JUDGMENTS screen can be called.
A Home Warrant must be retrieved before JUDGMENTS screen can be called.
A non MAGS ORDER case must be retrieved before JUDGMENTS screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before OBLIGATIONS screen can be called.
A CO record must first be selected before PAYMENTS screen can be called.
A case must first be selected before PAYMENTS screen can be called.
A warrant must first be selected before PAYMENTS screen can be called.
A CO record must be retrieved before PER screen can be called.
A warrant must first be selected before the REISSUE WARRANT screen can be called.
This warrant has already been reissued.
A case must first be selected before the REISSUE WARRANT screen can be called.
An AE record must first be selected before the PER Report can be run.
An AE number must be retrieved before PER screen can be called.
A judgment debtor must be selected before QUERY BY PART AE screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before TRANSFER screen can be called.
A CO record must first be selected before WARRANT RETURNS screen can be called.
A warrant must first be selected before WARRANT RETURNS screen can be called.
A CO record must first be selected before WARRANTS screen can be called.
A case must first be selected before WARRANTS screen can be called.
A case must be retrieved before Window For Trial screen can be called.
A non MAGS ORDER case must be retrieved before Window For Trial screen can be called.
A warrant must first be selected before WARRANT REFUNDS/FEES screen can be called.
You can only maintain fees for a warrant issued at your court.
The WARRANT REFUNDS/FEES screen cannot be called for re-issued warrants.
A case must be retrieved before Reset Case Status can be called.
A case must be retrieved before Reset Case Type can be called.
Cannot transfer, warrant is outstanding.
A CO record must first be selected before a CO can be transferred.
Please enter a non MAGS ORDER Case.
The case number entered does not exist.
Event XXX exists on the case. This event cannot now be entered.
An Event XXX must be entered first.
Event XXX must be completed first.
Case is not Stayed. This Event cannot be entered.
Case is XXX. This Event cannot now be entered.
XXX party type must exist on the case before event can be created.
You must have a Part 20 Claimant and a Part 20 Defendant on the case.
Cannot enter this Event as a Warrant does not exist for this Subject.
Judgment has already been entered. This Event cannot now be entered.
A judgment with the status SATISFIED or CANCELLED must be recorded against the subject.
Event cannot be entered, case is STAYED.
Event cannot be entered, the case is not currently allocated to a track.
This event can only be created on Family Enforcement cases.
Case number has to be 8 characters in length.
Case has been paid.
Case has been settled/withdrawn.
Case has been transferred.
Cannot change case type after the case has been marked for transfer.
The case has been transferred, warrant cannot be Re-Issued.
Cannot create event on a non CCBC case.
CCBC roles can only be applied on court 335.
The CAEO does not have a case number against the related debt.
This debt does not have a status of XXX.
Employer details are incomplete - you cannot continue.
First Payment Date cannot be null.
First Payment Date cannot be earlier than the event date.
A CO Number must be 6 numbers followed by 2 letters.
Instalment Amount cannot be null.
Live XXX warrant already exists.
Employer's named person field must be entered.
This CO has no debts.
Cannot create event - no debts exist on the CO record with a status of XXX.
XXX in court not yet releasable check debt less than CO balance.
The old CO number entered does not exist.
Payment Frequency cannot be null.
A dividend should be declared before deleting a debt.
This event cannot be created, the Revoked Discharged Date has already been set.
Current CO Status is not valid for this event. Event cannot be created.
CO Status changed to XXX.
Are you sure you want to clear all data? You will lose any unsaved changes.
A Case number has to be 6 digits in length.
A court with this court code is already in use.
The court code entered must be in the range 1 - 999.
The court id entered is already in use.
The court name entered is already in use.
The court name must be different to the previous value.
The court code entered does not exist.
Date received cannot be before Issue Date.
The Date cannot be earlier than BMS Live Date.
The Date cannot be earlier than SUPS Live Date.
This date cannot be in the future.
This date can only be in the future.
This date can only be in the past.
This date cannot be in the past.
This date is more than one month in the past.
This date cannot be more than or equal to one year in the past.
Date cannot be on a Sunday or public holiday.
Date must be a working day.
Date of birth cannot be in the future.
Are you sure you want to remove the code.
Date cannot precede the Application Date.
There is no End of Day record for today.
The Accounting Period has already been ended today.
No brought forward row in Payment Summary table.
Determination of Means is not applicable to CAEO.
Date cannot precede the Result Date.
End date is invalid.
Date cannot precede the Judgment Date.
XXX has not been issued.
Can enter only a Final Return code for this warrant.
This event must have previously been issued.
Live committal warrant already exists.
A fee has already been added for today.
A live POSSESSION or DELIVERY warrant already exists for this party.
Foreign warrants cannot have Local Return codes.
Foreign warrant cannot be entered, a foreign warrant with the same warrant number already exists on this case, owned by this court.
HRA Details can only be displayed for event 181.
First instalment must be after the date of order
First instalment cannot be before the date of order
The value entered is not an integer
You must enter at least one of: Case Number, AE Number, Judgment Debtor, Address 1, Employer Name.
Allowed hours must be greater than 0 and less than 1000.
Allowed minutes must be between 0 and 59.
This must be a 'Y' or a 'N'.
Currency amounts must be in the format of 0.00.
Amount of warrant must not be greater than balance of debt.
Invalid bailiff area number entered.
The case number entered does not match a valid 8 character format.
New cases should be in the format NLLNNNNN or LLNNNNNN.
New cases should be in the format LNNLLNNN (first character cannot be I or O) or NNNLLNNN.
The first two characters of a MAGS ORDER case number cannot be numeric.
You must enter at least one of: Case Number, Party Name, Address 1.
Invalid value for Case Type.
New Case Type is not valid for Old Case Type.
You must enter at least one of: CO Number, Debtor Name, Address 1, Employer Name.
This court is not in service.
The value does not conform to a valid date format of DD-MMM-YYYY, or is an invalid date.
The detail code must be no longer than 10 characters.
The entered text must be a single word (no spaces).
The entered text must only contain alphanumeric characters.
The entered text must begin with an alpha character.
Only a Y or N can be entered for District Registry.
The email address entered is not in the correct format.
You have entered an invalid value - please re-enter.
Final Return Codes must be greater than 300.
Invalid Hearing Outcome entered.
Outcomes of C, J or O cannot be entered for future Hearings.
Invalid value for Hearing Type.
This code is already in use, please re-enter.
National Coded Parties can only be created by Helpdesk.
Only National Interim Return Codes can begin with 'A'.
Interim Return Codes must be at least 2 characters.
Executing court cannot be the same as the issuing court.
The order number must numeric and no more than two digits.
Overpayee name cannot be the same as the Payee name.
National Coded Parties must be in the range 1500-1999 or 7000-9999.
The solicitor must be a national coded party.
The selected Party already has an Active Judgment against them. Please select another Party via the LOV button.
Nationally coded party code is not allowed.
The per category must be a single alphabetic character.
The detail code entered does not exist.
The per group must be a single alphabetic character.
The format of the postcode is invalid, please enter a postcode in the correct format or clear the field.
The prompt must be no longer than 30 characters.
Response must be 'Refuses Terms' if the result is 'Determined'.
Response must be 'Refuses Terms' if the result is 'Referred to Judge'.
Invalid return entered.
The receiving court must be different to the originating court.
Invalid sort code entered. Please enter a sort code in the format NN-NN-NN.
This court is not a SUPS court.
Time must be in 24 hour format HH:MM eg. 14:30.
You must enter at least one of: Case Number, CO Number, Party Name, Address 1, Postcode.
The warrant number entered does not match a valid format.
Invalid CCBC warrant number entered. The format must be LLNNNNN.
Only COMMITTAL or POSSESSION Warrants can be created on insolvency cases.
Estimated Days must be greater than 0 or blank.
Estimated Time - Hours must be 5 or less.
Estimated Time - Minutes must be less than 60.
Legal characters are a-z, 0-9.
Issue Date may not be before Date Request Received.
Judgment already exists for defendant.
Cannot enter judgment/enforcement - bar is set for this defendant.
Case status and bar on judgment/enforcement must be reset.
Cannot add event, judgment exists.
Judgment already exists against the subject and in favour of a party selected.
Cannot add event 103, judgment exists. You must set aside judgment first.
A judgment exists for XXX, but the status is YYY.
Subject must have a judgment of type DETERMINATION.
Judgment must be at least 15 days after date of service.
Judgment must be at least 29 days after date of service.
Cannot add event, a valid judgment must exist.
The AO Is No Longer Live.
Legal characters are 0-9.
Days cannot be negative.
This obligation does not exist.
The maximum amount for this field is XXX.
Maximum amount claimed is 99999999.99.
Maximum fee for this case type is XXX.
You can only select up to 2 parties against.
You can only have 1 instance of this party type.
Maximum solicitors costs is 9999.99.
Maximum fee for warrants is XXX.
Courts can have a maximum of one office address.
Courts can have a maximum of one welsh office address.
Please enter an Applicant.
Please enter a Company.
Please enter a Debtor.
Please enter at least one Claimant and one Defendant.
Value must be greater than 0.
Rate cannot be negative.
Fee cannot be negative.
Cannot navigate to this screen with a MAGS ORDER Case.
Entering a refund that results in a negative total fee is not allowed.
No AE application exists for this case and defendant.
Please enter Date of Issue.
No dividends exist for this CO record.
Event 334 must exist for the subject.
Event XXX must exist for the subject.
Event 480 must exist for the subject.
Event 60 must exist for the subject.
No HRA Details exist.
FORTHWITH Judgments must have no instalment amount.
No Warrants Exist.
This coded party does not exist.
Bailiff Id must be a number
Please enter numeric values only in this field.
Please enter numeric values only in this field.
You must be on a valid warrant event.
You must be on a valid warrant returns event.
This date has already been added.
No notice of issue produced for this case.
No obligations have ever existed for this case.
No payments exist for this CO record.
No results were found for the given search criteria.
FORTHWITH Judgments must have no payment date.
Not a valid AE Event to call AE Event screen.
Interim Return Codes must be alphabetic.
The Start Date cannot be later than the End Date.
The case status is PAID. Only COMMITTAL warrants can be created.
Valid judgment must exist.
Order date must be before payment date
Case Management Conference Date cannot be earlier than today's date.
Must be less than the Sub Total.
Paid before judgment must be less than judgment amount plus costs
The detail code entered already exists.
Start Date cannot be earlier than today's date.
Date of payment/first instalment must not be before the date order made
This case is either paid or transferred
The status of the CO is not live
Case number not found
Attachment of Earnings number not found
Foreign warrant number not found
Home warrant number not found
CO number not found
Date of payment cannot be before date of order made
Judgments first instalment not yet elapsed for XXX.
Payments do not exist for this Case.
Payments do not exist for this AE.
Payments do not exist for this Warrant.
Payment must be greater then 0.00.
Event disallowed - PER and/or NDR details are incomplete.
Response time for previous order has not yet expired.
A refund has already been added for today.
No changes have been made
End of Day Report has already been run for today.
Complete Payout has already been run for today.
End of Day Report has already been run for today.
Pre-Payout List has been run as part of Payout processing.
CO records must be selected for declaration of dividends.
CO Status is already set to PAID.
There is no money in court for this CO.
An overpayment exists which must be resolved.
This CO Number has already been entered.
CO number not found.
Payout currently being run by another user.
Dividend Payout currently being run by another user.
The new code entered must be an existing code.
The new code cannot be the same as the current code.
Cannot reset case status after the case has been marked for transfer.
Event not allowed - a response has been filed.
Return code 158 cannot be created from this screen.
Warrant return code already exists.
Return code is only allowed for county court possession warrants.
Return code is only allowed for foreign warrants.
Return code is only allowed for possession or delivery warrants.
Return Date must be before Date Entered.
Date of Service may not be before Issue Date.
Service date must be on or after the date the event was entered.
The system data item entered already exists.
Cannot transfer to own court where no change of jurisdiction can occur.
Case has been Discontinued and may not be transferred.
Case has been Paid and may not be transferred.
Case has been Settled and may not be transferred.
Case has been Withdrawn and may not be transferred.
Case status is SETTLED/WDRN and may not be transferred.
Insolvency cases cannot be transferred to non SUPS courts.
Cannot transfer case as it has an outstanding AE linked to a party which cannot be accepted by a non SUPS court. Case must be transferred manually.
Only a CCBC Manager can transfer a case back to CCBC.
Please select a Court different to the current Court.
Consolidated Orders cannot be transferred to CCBC.
Verified date cannot be earlier than the return date.
Warrant number XXX already exists for issuing court.
The warrant has already been Paid.
Foreign warrant cannot be returned to the issuing court.
Cannot create warrants for XXX cases.
Date of Service may not be before Issue Date.
Start date is invalid .
Cannot remove amount as total fees would be negative.
Case has been Discontinued and may not be transferred.
Case has been Paid and may not be transferred.
Case has been Settled and may not be transferred.
Case has been Withdrawn and may not be transferred.
A valid court must be entered for the return code being used.
Warrant number XXX already exists for issuing court.
The warrant has already been Paid.
Unable to identify warrant - Issued at previous court.
Foreign warrant cannot be returned to the issuing court.
Cannot create warrants for XXX cases.
Another user has made changes to this case. Your changes have not been saved. Case needs to be retreived again.
Warrant cannot be more than or equal to one year in the past.
This warrant return has an error.
Warrant is still live.
Start Date must not be after End Date.
An amount of zero cannot be entered.
Value must be greater than 0.
Application Date cannot be after the Order Date.
CO Type cannot be changed to CAEO where SCHEDULE 2 debts exist.
Must be in the range 1 to 99.
Amount can not be greater than the total outstanding.
Date cannot be before the Order Date.
Date must be in the future.
Date cannot precede the Order Date.
Must be in the format 9999999.99
Releaseable money in court. Declare a dividend before changing the status from Pending, Schedule2 or Deleted.
Dividend(s) declared on the debt, hence cannot be deleted.
Cannot delete the debt, CO balance will become negative.
A dividend should be declared before deleting a debt.
Dividend(s) declared on the debt, status cannot be set to Pending.
Cannot change the debt to Pending, CO balance will become negative.
A dividend should be declared before changing the debt to Pending.
Cannot change the debt status to Pending - money held in court that is not yet releasable.
A CAEO may not have a SCHEDULE2 debt.
Invalid local party code.
Balance of the debt cannot be negative.
Money in court - amount allowed would produce negative CO balance.
No Window for Trial records exist.
The instalment amount exceeds the total due.
Paid before judgment cannot be greater than judgment amount plus costs.
Must be in the range 1 to 98
Must be in the range 1 to 28
Payment date cannot be before judgment order date
Old number already used on CO number.
CO number must be 8 characters. Please ensure format is YYnnnnXX. YY is the current year, nnnn is the sequence number and XX is the court Id.
Can not save a CO that has no debts.
Invalid status. Must be one of LIVE, PENDING or SCHEDULE2 when adding a debt.
The CO Number supplied does not exist on the system.
Date cannot be after the Order Date.
Cannot have a CO status of CAEO, if there are debts that do not have a case number associated with them.
AE number must be 8 characters. Ensure format is XXnnnnnn, nnnXnnnn or XX/nnnnn.
Warrant number must be 8 characters. Ensure format is Xnnnnnnn or nnnnn/nn.
The local warrant number entered does not match a valid format.
Please enter a 4 digit number
Only numeric values allowed
Please select a case row before navigating.
Transaction Number must be purely numerical.
Must be in the range 0.01 to 99999999.99
Overpayment amount cannot exceed original payment amount.
Must be in the range 0.01 to 99999999.99
At least one In Favour Party must be selected.
The selected Party Against already has an Active Judgment against them for the same In Favour Party(ies). Please select another Party.
Warrant amount cannot be greater than current CO balance.
You can only maintain fees for an Attachment of Earnings issued at your court.
Both a start and end date are required.
Please enter a valid start and end date.
Valid Values are - 'I' or 'F'
Please enter either 'H', 'F' or '%' for Warrant Type.
No Such warrant type. Please Enter Correct Warrant Type.
Please enter '1', '2' or '%'.
Local Warrant Number does not exist
Please Enter A Valid Return Code Only.
Defendant Id must be a number
Invalid Defendant Id for Case Number
Case number/Warrant number not found in WARRANTS.
The case number entered was not found.
No record was found for the hearing date entered.
The consolidated order entered was not found.
No record was found for the review date entered.
The Start of Day Reports have already been run.
Please enter Numeric value.
Bailiff ID cannot be 99.
This is not a valid value - see list of Values
Please enter a number. Negative numbers are inappropriate. Please reenter.
Please enter a value between 1 and 100.
CO Number does not exist
Creditor number does not exist
There are no receipts to be printed today
There are no receipts to be printed for this user and date
At least one party must be selected.
Please enter at least two letters.
A maximum of two wildcards are allowed.
The warrant entered cannot be reprinted.
Date must be earlier than today
The Start Date must be earlier than the End Date
Total Costs exceed Issue Fee plus Issue Costs plus Judgment Fixed Costs.
Year code must be the same in both numbers.
Second character of Warrant Number to must be A-Z.
2nd char can not have lower value than 2nd char of Warrant Number From.
Warrant Number To must be greater than Warrant Number From.
Second character of Warrant Number to must be 0-9.
At least three characters must be specified.
Field may only contain alphanumeric characters i.e. A-Z, 0-9.
Querying on CCBC cases is not allowed.
